data.name: AddTitlesWishlist
data.value: Add titles to your wishlist to appear here

data.name: BasicRequired
data.value: The basic section is mandatory for now. The other sections can be filled in later.

data.name: BirthdateTip
data.value: Only your age will be published. (We use the Gregorian calendar)

data.name: CompatibilityDeveloping
data.value: Our compatibility system is still developing. If you have any suggestions or feedback, please submit a support ticket or email us.

data.name: CompatibilityHigh
data.value: Congratulations, you two are made for each other. This relationship has a bright future ahead of it.

data.name: CompatibilityLow
data.value: Unfortunately, you don't have much in common. We wish you both the best of luck, as it won't be an easy task.

data.name: CompatibilityMedium
data.value: You are not a perfect couple, but that doesn't mean that the relationship will fail. Review our report carefully and work through these differences together.

data.name: CompleteAllSteps
data.value: To make your profile public, first complete all the steps

data.name: DemoAlert
data.value: We've set up your profile with a few sample items to give you a quick tour of the available features.

data.name: FeatureNotAvailable
data.value: This feature is only available in phase {0}

data.name: FollowTitle
data.value: Follow titles so they appear here (if it is a series or a movie that is part of a sequence).

data.name: GalleryTerm1
data.value: The photo taken by your camera will be kept private (it will not be accessible within the platform) for future verification, if necessary.

data.name: GalleryTerm2
data.value: The data resulting from this validation (attributes of your face) will not be kept on our servers and will only exist during the detection process.

data.name: GenerateSimulation
data.value: Do you want to generate a match simulation? This is just to demonstrate how our compatibility system works.

data.name: GpsNotAccurate
data.value: The GPS position is not accurate and may result in an incorrect location. If your city is wrong, please try again later or test on another device or browser.

data.name: HelpUsUnlock
data.value: Help us unlock the next phase faster! Leave a review to help us grow. The more people who know about the app and sign up, the sooner all the features will be available for you to enjoy.

data.name: HeroCall
data.value: Start your journey to find your ideal partner

data.name: HeroNote
data.value: Note: Not a dating app. A curated matchmaking experience focused on real compatibility.

data.name: ITrustPlataform
data.value: I trust the platform's compatibility system and will only select what is non-negotiable for me.

data.name: MarkPlatforms
data.value: Mark platforms as favorites to appear here

data.name: Maximum3Items
data.value: Choose a maximum of 3 items for each field

data.name: PartnerProfileNotAvailable
data.value: Your partner's profile is not yet available

data.name: PopulateFilterDescription
data.value: This process is constantly evolving. If you would like to report an error or improvement, please open a ticket with our support team.

data.name: PreferHelpTopic1
data.value: Here you can define your ideal profile type, so that we can properly calculate your compatibility index

data.name: PreferHelpTopic2
data.value: The more specific you are in the filters, the less profile options you will have available

data.name: ProfileDataBioTip1
data.value: To ensure a positive environment, we take harassment and bias seriously. If you encounter this type of behavior, please report the profile immediately.

data.name: ProfileDataBioTip2
data.value: If you find it challenging to interact or recognize harmful intentions, consider reaching out to friends or family for support.

data.name: ProfileDataPersonTip1
data.value: For more complex personalities, explore tests on specialized sites. Some can be answered just by reading the item descriptions.

data.name: ProfileFilterWarning
data.value: Select only what really matters. You can choose up to 8 filters to keep matches relevant.

data.name: ProfileNotFound
data.value: Profile not found or not yet registered properly.

data.name: ProfilePrivateMode
data.value: Your profile is now in private mode and will not be seen or shared with anyone

data.name: ProfilePublicMode
data.value: Your profile is now public and can be made available to our customers

data.name: RegionsApplied
data.value: Regions have been automatically applied for your favorite providers. If they are wrong, please remove and add them again.

data.name: StepProfileDesc
data.value: Fill in your details: Basic, Bio, Lifestyle, Personality, Interests, Relationship, and Goals.

data.name: StepSettingsDesc
data.value: Control your profile options and platform behavior.

data.name: StepValidationDesc
data.value: The system will verify your information before your profile goes public.

data.name: TermTopic1
data.value: Be honest in the answers given on this form. All information contained herein is open to denouncements and may be evaluated;

data.name: TermTopic2
data.value: To be aware of how your data will be treated, we ask you to read our

data.name: UnableDetectGps
data.value: We were unable to detect a GPS system on your device. Please try again or release access to your device's GPS.

data.name: WhatHaveYouWatched
data.value: What items have you already watched?

data.name: YouHaveSelected
data.value: You have selected more than {0} options
